response.justification: Bogdan possesses exceptionally relevant Staff-level experience, including recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at Stripe. His background at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second demonstrates deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his strong systems thinking, polyglot background, and direct alignment with the AI-driven engineering mindset make him a highly compelling candidate.
strengths: Direct experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput architectures handling millions of requests per second.
Strong Staff-level background with a polyglot approach and systems-thinking mindset.
concerns: Lacks the strong Python expertise explicitly required in the must-have technical skills.
Missing explicit evidence of participating in out-of-hours on-call rotations or acting as a scrum champion.
Resume contains anomalous timeline and title entries (e.g., future Stripe start date, Founder at Datadog).
